name: source-file format: source: header MUST contain id, authoritative_publisher, authoritative_url, registry_link, fetched_at, content_hash, fetch_frequency, fragility_tier, license_note
setup:
printf 'source:
  id: src-1
  authoritative_publisher: Acme
  authoritative_url: https://acme.example.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml#src-1
  fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:abc
  fetch_frequency: daily
  fragility_tier: medium
  license_note: CC-BY-4.0
rules:
  - id: g-acme-001
    name: rule-one
    description: x
    detector: rubric/detectors/x.sh
    type: problem
    fixable: null
    has_suggestions: false
    deprecated: false
    replaced_by: []
    docs_url: https://acme.example.com/r1
    requires_type_checking: false
    recommended: true
    severity: P1
    version: 1.0.0
    semver: 1.0.0
    rule_state: warn-only
    provenance: [{source: acme, class: published-standard, section_id: "5.1", url: https://acme.example.com/r1, fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z, content_hash: sha256:abc}]
recommended_set: [g-acme-001]
all_set: [g-acme-001]
' > file.yaml
